name: The Second Meeting
overview: Separate, connected episodes about a man’s relationship with a woman as sisters, friends, or husbands, through the occurrence of some social events between them, then they separate and return again, and each of them remembers the other and the events that occurred between them.

trailers.title: اللقاء الثاني: تتر البداية .. علي الحجار - حنان ماضي - عمر خيرت
